calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday April 2, 2015 in Department 525:
Lily Tong, Appellant/Plaintiff appears as propria Persona.
Issa Karkar DDS, Respondent/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Lily Tong testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
EXHR (1) - group exhibits - treatment plan, invoices, etc.

Dr. Karkar testifies on his own behalf; no evidendance presented.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Evidence from Appellant/Plaintiff retained by the Court.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Judgment Entered
